today.title: Your day, at a glance
today.body: This ring is today's focus. Tap a glowing habit to complete it and power up your hero.

add.title: Add anything in seconds
add.body: Tap here to speak or type a new habit, activity, or goal — whenever inspiration strikes.

community.title: You're not alone
community.body: Projects and Feed live in the tabs below — your everyday habits power real-world goals and a community on the same journey.

finish.title: You're all set ✨
finish.body: That's the tour. Dive in — your hero levels up every time you show up.

intro.title: Welcome to the War Room
intro.body: This is where you turn intentions into focused action. You'll pick what you're fighting, how you'll focus, and what you'll actually do — then start a distraction-free session.

dragon.title: Choose your dragon
dragon.body: Your dragon is the obstacle you're battling — distraction, procrastination, self-doubt. Naming it makes it easier to beat. Pick the one in your way today, or create your own.

gadget.title: Pick a war gadget
gadget.body: A war gadget is your focus technique, like Pomodoro or Deep Work. Each one sets how long you focus before a break. Choose what fits your energy — the 🧠 note explains why it works.

missions.title: Choose your missions
missions.body: Missions are the activities you'll do this session. Add one or a few, then tap Begin battle to start a focused run.

intro.title: Plan your days
intro.body: The planner is your calendar of habits. Tap any day to see what's scheduled and add activities ahead of time.

checklists.title: Each day's checklists
checklists.body: Under the selected date you'll see only that day's checklists, color-matched to the calendar. Tap "View all checklists" to see every list.

intro.title: Your community feed
intro.body: The feed is where you and others share wins and encouragement on the same journey.

privacy.title: You're in control
privacy.body: Posts are private by default — you choose who sees each one. Share a streak or a hard-won session whenever you like; it's always optional.

intro.title: Community Projects
intro.body: Projects let you build habits together toward a shared, real-world goal.

join.title: Join or prepare
join.body: Pick a project that inspires you. The habits you already do can count toward it — small actions, big collective impact.

intro.title: Make it yours
intro.body: Settings is where you control privacy, language, AI, your hero and more. Everything is private by default.

helpers.title: Replay tips anytime
helpers.body: Want a refresher? Turn these first-time tips back on here whenever you want them again.
